title: Company Dissolution Services in Vietnam
metaDescription: InCorp Vietnam manages company dissolution end to end — legal, accounting and HR procedures — to deregister your company quickly, simply and in full compliance with Vietnamese authorities.

hero.title: Company Dissolution Services: Quick, Simple, Compliant
hero.subtitle: If you choose to cease operations and close your company in Vietnam, you must follow the necessary procedures to deregister with the appropriate authorities. We handle the entire process on your behalf.

items.title: Expert Guidance, Smooth Process
items.desc: Experienced professionals prevent errors and ensure every dissolution step is done correctly.

items.title: Effortless Paperwork
items.desc: We manage the documentation and administrative burden, saving you valuable time.

items.title: Guaranteed Legal Compliance
items.desc: We ensure a lawful, worry-free closure that satisfies all regulatory requirements.

items.title: Minimized Risks
items.desc: We reduce post-dissolution complications so you can move on with peace of mind.

sections.heading: Forms of company dissolution
body: Voluntary dissolution occurs when owners decide to close. Common situations include the specified operating period expiring without extension, or owners discontinuing due to business inefficiency.
Compulsory dissolution is mandated by the government for reasons such as legal violations or failure to maintain the minimum shareholder or member requirements.
Before dissolution can complete, all debts and property obligations must be fully settled.

items.title: Submit Dissolution Notice
items.desc: File the dissolution notice within 7 days of the resolution to dissolve.

items.title: Status Updated to 'In Progress'
items.desc: The Business Registration Office updates your company's status accordingly.

items.title: Liquidate Debts
items.desc: Settle outstanding debts in the legally required priority order.

items.title: Submit Full Application
items.desc: File the complete application together with asset and liquidation reports.

items.title: Final Confirmation
items.desc: The tax authority confirms clearance and the dissolution is finalized.

sections.heading: What InCorp Vietnam handles for you
items: Submission to the Department of Planning and Investment
Payroll, PIT and social insurance reporting

sections.title: Closing your company in Vietnam?
sections.subtitle: Let our experts handle the dissolution quickly and compliantly.
